measures.what_it_does: Authorizes regular property-tax levies for six years to fund emergency medical services in Republic.
measures.cost_line: $0.50 per $1,000 assessed value, or $250 annually on $500,000.
measures.pro_summary: Official material identifies Republic EMS as the use; no committee statement was available.
measures.con_summary: No committee statement was available; the direct tradeoff is EMS funding versus six years of property tax.

taxes.basis: YES authorizes a six-year regular property-tax levy for EMS.

measures.what_it_does: Continues the district's regular EMS levy for six years, collected from 2027 through 2032 outside Republic.
measures.cost_line: $0.50 per $1,000 assessed value, or $250 annually on $500,000.
measures.pro_summary: Official material identifies district EMS as the use; no committee statement was available.
measures.con_summary: No committee statement was available; the direct tradeoff is continued EMS funding versus six years of property tax.

taxes.basis: YES continues an existing six-year regular property-tax levy for EMS.
